## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an [x] -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Infrastructure/CDK changes

<!-- Link to related GitHub issues using #issue-number -->

## Testing
<!-- Describe the testing you've performed -->
- [ ] Local development testing completed
- [ ] CDK synth runs successfully
- [ ] CDK deploy tested in development account
- [ ] Manual testing of new functionality
- [ ] No existing functionality broken

## Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Code comments added/updated
- [ ] Architecture documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] NOTICE file updated (if new dependencies added)

## Security
- [ ] No credentials or secrets in code
- [ ] No internal references (a2z, isengard, corp domains)
- [ ] Git-secrets scan passed locally
- [ ] IAM policies follow least-privilege principle
- [ ] Security best practices followed

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] Branch is up-to-date with main
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] Ready for review
